headline: AppLovin Expands Axon AI As Investors Weigh Broader Growth Potential
summary: AppLovin (NasdaqGS:APP) is expanding its Axon AI technology into a broader performance marketing platform that reaches beyond mobile gaming. The company is extending its tools into e-commerce advertising and testing new generative AI products for ad creation and optimization. A new collaboration with Stagwell aims to improve mobile campaign performance for brand and agency clients using AppLovin's AI capabilities. For investors, the shift at AppLovin is about more than mobile game ads. The...
